Notice Of Motion To Strike Of Defts How Wachspress And Janette Wachspresss To Complaint Of Pltf. Patricia Barlow
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Barlow, 977-1107, plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona
How Wachspress, 440-1053, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS HOW WACHSPRESS and JANETTE WACHSPRESS' Motion To Strike request for attorneys fees in the Complaint Of Plaintiff Patricia Barlow is granted. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/xGW) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Barlow, 977-1107, plaintiff and opposing party appearing in propria persona
How Wachspress, 440-1053, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS HOW WACHSPRESS and JANETTE WACHSPRESS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Complaint on its face states valid claim and is not uncertain. Defendants have 5 days to answer from notice of entry of order. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/xGW) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
